zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Erbery於大約1560年出生時，她的父親Henry Erbery41歲，母親Margery Woldridge38歲。她於1573年與Richard Guild在英國英格蘭素福爾可維斯塔爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1590年12月24日在英國素福爾可雷迪善姆享年31歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可望福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Erbery于大约1560年出生时，她的父亲Henry Erbery41岁，母亲Margery Woldridge38岁。她于1573年与Richard Guild在英国英格兰素福爾可維斯塔爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1590年12月24日在英国素福爾可雷迪善姆享年31岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可望福德。

nameMeanings.name: Erbery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Embry
meanings: English: habitational name either from Emborough (Somerset), any of the three places called Hembury (Devon), or any of three place called Henbury (Gloucestershire, Cheshire, Dorset). Emborough is from Old English emn ‘flat-topped’ + beorg ‘mound or hill’, while Henbury in Gloucestershire comes from Old English hēah ‘high’ + burh (dative byrig) ‘fortified place’. Henbury in Chesire has an uncertain first element, possibly Old English hæmed ‘community’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Emery   1.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Erbery was born about 1560, her father, Henry Erbery, was 41 and her mother, Margery Woldridge, was 38. She married Richard Guild in 1573, in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 December 1590, in Redisham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Wangford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Erbery est née environ 1560, son père, Henry Erbery, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margery Woldridge, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Guild en 1573, à Westhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 décembre 1590, à Redisham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Wangford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Erbery um 1560 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Erbery 41 und ihre Mutter Margery Woldridge 38. Sie hat 1573 in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Richard Guild geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Dezember 1590 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Redisham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Wangford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Erbery è nata il circa 1560, sua padre, Henry Erbery, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margery Woldridge, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Richard Guild nel 1573, nel Westhall, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 dicembre 1590, nel Redisham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Wangford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Erberyが約1560年に生まれた時，父Henry Erberyは41歳，母Margery Woldridgeは38歳であった。1573年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエスサルでRichard Guildと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1590年12月24日にイギリススフォルクレディシャムで31歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクワングフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Erbery(이)가 대략 1560년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Erbery(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Woldridge(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1573년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웨스솔에서 Richard Guild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 12월 24일 영국 수폴크 레디샤에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 왕퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Erbery nasceu aproximadamente 1560, seu pai, Henry Erbery, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margery Woldridge, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Guild em 1573, em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1590, em Redisham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Erbery родилась около 1560 г., её отцу по имени Henry Erbery было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Woldridge, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Guild в 1573 г. в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 декабря 1590 г. в местности редишам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности вангфорд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Erbery nació aproximadamente 1560, su papá, Henry Erbery, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margery Woldridge, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Richard Guild en 1573, en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1590, en Redisham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Wangford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
